basic_details.job_title: Kalahandi District Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 63 Dental Technician, Pharmacist and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Office of the Chief District Medical & Public Health Officer-cum-District Mission Director, National Health Mission (NHM), Kalahandi (District Programme Management Unit), Odisha
basic_details.post_name: Various Posts (Paediatric Specialist DEIC, M.O. MBBS, AYUSH M.O., Pharmacist RBSK, RMNCH/FP Counsellor, Physiotherapist, ANM and more)
basic_details.total_vacancies: 63 Posts across 17 categories (provisional; may increase or decrease)
basic_details.job_type: Temporary, Contractual (11 months, extendable), Co-terminus with the scheme
basic_details.short_information: This In-House Selection is meant exclusively for serving NHM employees of the OSH & FW Society who wish to be posted in Kalahandi District against existing vacancies in their own post. There is no online application; candidates must apply through the Walk-in mode only.

qualification.details: This selection is open only to candidates already serving under National Health Mission in the OSH & FW Society, not to fresh or external applicants. Eligibility is determined based on current employment status, valid contract, and documentary proof of uninterrupted service.
qualification.domicile: To be furnished in the application form (SC/ST/SEBC/UR and district of domicile) as applicable.

selection_process: this In-House Selection does not involve a written examination. Selection is based on Walk-in document verification followed by an incumbency-based assessment of service length.
Eligible employees must attend the Walk-in on the date assigned to their post category
and submit the filled application form along with all supporting documents for verification.
the length of last uninterrupted service of the employee in the same post under the society is taken into account
along with the previous posting station and present place of posting. Candidates with the highest incumbency are selected and posted against the available vacancies.
how_to_apply: Applications are accepted only in offline mode through the Walk-in process; there is no online application facility for this In-House Selection.
Download the application form from www.kalahandi.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the form completely and paste a recent colour passport-size photograph at the designated space.

Attach self-attested photocopies of all required documents, including the NOC cum Continuation Certificate, last contract renewal order, identity proof, educational certificates, and caste certificate.
Sign the declaration provided in the application form.
Attend the Walk-in on the date assigned to the post applied for, at the Video Conference Hall, O/o CDM & PHO, Kalahandi, between 10:00 AM and 12:00 Noon.
Submit the filled application along with attachments for on-the-spot verification; late submissions will not be entertained.
important_instructions: This selection is open only to NHM employees serving in the same post in a district other than Kalahandi. No candidates will be entertained after the scheduled Walk-in date and time. The number of vacancies under this advertisement is provisional and may increase or decrease depending on the actual vacancy position. Time-to-time notifications regarding the status of the selection process will be web-hoisted on the district website. All communication will be made through email or the district website; candidates must check www.kalahandi.odisha.gov.in at regular intervals. No personal query will be entertained. The competent authority reserves the right to cancel or reject any or all applications without assigning any reason. This office will not be responsible for any delay in candidates reporting on the scheduled date.

_labels.apply_online: Visit Official Website for Notification & Application Form

all_official_links.label: Visit Official Website for Notification & Application Form

faq.question: Q1. Who can apply for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: Only NHM employees of the OSH & FW Society who are currently working in the same post in a district other than Kalahandi and wish to be posted in Kalahandi can apply.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are notified under NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 63 vacancies across 17 posts have been notified, including Paediatric Specialist, M.O. MBBS, AYUSH M.O., Pharmacist, Counsellor, Physiotherapist, and ANM positions; the number is provisional and may change.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: Applications are accepted only in offline mode through Walk-in; there is no online application portal for this selection.

faq.question: Q4. What is the Walk-in schedule for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: Walk-in is held on 14-07-2026 for SL No. 1-4, on 15-07-2026 for SL No. 5-9, and on 17-07-2026 for SL No. 10-17, with registration from 10:00 AM to 12:00 Noon each day.

faq.question: Q5. Where is the Walk-in venue for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: The Walk-in is held at the Video Conference Hall, O/o CDM & PHO, Kalahandi.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: Key documents include the NOC cum Continuation Certificate, last contract renewal order, identity proof, educational certificates, HSC certificate, caste certificate, and a passport-size photograph.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the posts under NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: The posts are temporary, contractual, and co-terminus with the scheme, with an engagement period of 11 months that may be extended based on performance.

faq.question: Q8. How will selection be made for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on document verification at the Walk-in and incumbency, meaning candidates with the highest length of uninterrupted service in the same post are given preference; there is no written examination.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an application fee for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this In-House Selection.

faq.question: Q10. What happens if a candidate misses the scheduled Walk-in date for NHM Kalahandi In-House Selection 2026?
faq.answer: No candidate will be entertained after the scheduled Walk-in date and time, as per the official notification.
